message:
feat(runtime,command): complete Sequence frame adoption across runtime and Lua eval

Finish migrating all pub/sub handlers to RespFrame::Sequence:

Runtime layer (fr-runtime):
- Replace RespFrame::Array(Some(replies)) with RespFrame::Sequence(replies)
  across all 8 pub/sub command handlers including SPUBLISH and PUBLISH
- Add pubsub_multi_subscribe_encodes_as_resp_sequence test validating
  correct RESP byte encoding for multi-channel subscriptions

Command layer (fr-command):
- Add ref keyword to Sequence pattern match in test for correct borrowing
- Extend resp_to_lua() to handle both Array(Some(items)) and
  Sequence(items) via combined pattern, ensuring Lua scripts can process
  both frame types as tables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
